name: ArGo - Mouthpiece Frosted
summary: ArGo - Mouthpiece Frosted — a accessory for keeping your kit running.
description: The Arizer ArGo - Mouthpiece Frosted features an expertly designed, informative water pipe adapter that is compatible with 14mm or 19mm fittings for maximum versatility. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
